street.description: Street on which U-turns are prohibited; for numbered sub-entries, the street named in the header paragraph

direction.description: Direction(s) of travel the prohibition applies to; 'all' for 'both directions'; empty when the source states none

cross_street.description: Intersecting street for at-intersection prohibitions ('on STREET at CROSS'); empty for segment entries

from_point.description: Segment start anchor: street, municipal line, driveway, bridge, or other named feature as written, leading article dropped; empty for intersection entries or when the source leaves the anchor unstated

from_offset_feet.description: Distance in feet from from_point to the actual segment start, when the source defines the start as an offset point; empty when the start is at from_point itself

from_offset_direction.description: Compass bearing of the from-offset, 8-point compass ('northeasterly' normalizes to northeast); empty unless from_offset_feet is set

to_point.description: Segment end anchor, same form as from_point; empty for intersection entries or when the source leaves the anchor unstated

to_offset_feet.description: Distance in feet from to_point (or, when to_point is empty, from the segment start) to the actual segment end

to_offset_direction.description: Compass bearing of the to-offset, 8-point compass ('northeasterly' normalizes to northeast); empty unless to_offset_feet is set

exception.description: Carve-out clause without the leading 'except', whitespace-collapsed and de-hyphenated (e.g. 'seventy-five (75) feet in front of police headquarters for police and other emergency vehicles')

location_detail.description: Positional qualifier attached to the street itself that fits no other column; endpoint phrases stay whole in from_point/to_point and never go here

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text; never carries data
